assets.name: lecture_09_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best of the early Hamiltonian-board near-duplicates; the kinetic piece and the added potential term V(x)\psi^\dagger(x)\psi(x) are the most legible.

assets.name: lecture_09_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Most useful mid-lecture board layout for the short-range interaction discussion, with both the contact-interaction sketch and supporting equations visible.

assets.name: lecture_09_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Clearest centered shot of the two-component equation with H=\alpha p and the matrix form of the spatial derivative term.

assets.name: lecture_09_frame_04.png
assets.rationale: Useful reference for the operator-algebra conditions \alpha^2=1, \beta^2=1, and the anticommutation relation, even though the frame is partially obstructed.
